Frank Kern
Video Ad Framework
How To Make Video Ads That Sell
www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

How To Make Video Ads That Sell
Ideally, These Can be used For Facebook And YouTube
• 	Dog Whistle Intro “This is for people who …”
• 	Sell Them on Watching “In this video, you’ll learn …”
• 	Intro And Establish Credibility (If possible). “I’ve helped XX people with this …”
• 	Teach Them Something “Three Big Secrets”
• 	Transition Into Pitch “If You’re Serious About This, …”
• 	State The Offer “When you click below, you can get …”
• 	Explain The Benefits “This is going to help you because …”
• 	Give call to action “Click the link below this ad …”
www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 2 --
